description: Persana AI is a GTM engine that unifies 100+ data sources to enrich leads, track buying signals, and automate personalized outreach with AI agents.
overview: Persana AI unifies many data sources to build target lists, track live signals like hiring and funding, and run AI agents that generate messages and sequences.
what_is: Persana AI is a sales and growth platform that helps teams find, engage, and close faster with AI and data enrichment. It pulls together more than 100 data sources and automates personalized outreach, so prospecting scales without losing accuracy.

It is strongest at building ICP lists, tracking live signals such as hiring and funding events, and running AI agents that draft messages and sequences. Lead lists and personalized emails come together in minutes rather than weeks.

Persana integrates with CRMs, email tools, Slack, and ad platforms and can send email natively, acting as a full-stack GTM engine. It is not a standalone CRM or forecasting tool; it adds lead intelligence and automation on top of your systems.
